title: Top Eleven Be Football Manager
notes: Get your squad ready and download this new version of Top Eleven, Managers! We’ve made improvements to the game and fixed some bugs, so you can enjoy the soccer dream and compete with other soccer fans out there. See you on the touchline!

title: Match Factory!
notes:
• NEW PACK: Fishing Trip

New items are coming every 2 weeks! Be sure to update your game to get the latest content!

title: Heart of Vegas - Casino Slots
notes:
Hello, Heart of Vegas Friends!
We have some improvements for you.
In this release we have got some bug fixes and improvements.

title: Arknights
notes:
Update Note 
-This is a mandatory update, after which you should download and install the app again manually. Please log in and bind your account to at least one third-party account before the update if you are currently using a guest account to play the game.

title: Top War: Battle Game
notes:
Patch Notes
[New] Added a "Like" feature for chat messages (available in select Warzones).

title: Pikmin Bloom
notes:
Thanks for playing Pikmin Bloom! New in this version:

- Adjusted the sorting order of mushrooms in the Expeditions Tab. Mushroom battles you've been invited to will continue to be prioritized. If you still have free mushroom battle tries remaining for the day, mushrooms with four or fewer participants will now be shown next.
- Minor improvements and bug fixes.

*Please download the latest version of the app from the store for the changes above to be reflected.

title: Racing Master
notes: Racing Master enters new season with new vehicles and new content!

title: Cash Club Casino - Vegas Slots
notes:
Here are couple of the enhancements you'll find in the latest update:

~ New Slot Games!

~ Various improvements and bug fixes.

~ New events!

Hope you like this update!

Good luck and have fun in Cash Club :)

title: Lords Mobile: Kingdom Wars
notes:
Football fever has gripped not just the world, but the Kingdoms of Athena as well!
Take part in the Lords Ball Carnival to get an event Castle Skin, Army Skin, Route Skin, Turf Decorations, Emotes, and many more!

# Various UI adjustments:
．Guild Fest: Added special quest requirement note to Gear Crafting quests: "Must unlock the Lunar Foundry to complete quest"
．Hero Stages: Added Hero Ultimate skill range display during Auto Battle
．Revamped the Shelter's interface (Only affects Quick Battle)

title: DC: Dark Legion™
notes:
[New Themed Event: Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow]
A conversation about Lobo in the Batcave's Living Quarters awakens a long-sealed memory in Supergirl—an interplanetary adventure that marks the beginning of her legend as the Woman of Tomorrow.
